review_title: Excellent Reporting, Planning and Analysis Tool
description: Takes some time to learn but once you do, it's very useful and allows for efficient workflow.
author: Michael H.
pros: It does everything and FP&A team could ever wish for.
cons: It takes quite some time and training to learn how to use.

review_title: Great financial planning and analysis tool
description: Very good for financial domains, and ones you get the hang of it the platform is User Friendly
author: Elena S.
pros: For what I used it is very good for forecasting and integrating things such as SAP.
cons: I required extensive training to achieve this, can be complex

description: Overall, I’ve used worse. Reporting and data visualizations were great, AI tools weren’t. Still needs work as many AI tools do, and I think that part was probably deployed too soon, tbh.
author: Carrie G.
pros: Little work to maintain after setup, data visualizations were pretty good! I really appreciated the planning and forecasting tools.
cons: Setup took aaaaaaages. It’s best if you have someone take a certification class to do the setup if you can swing it.

description: i researched this service when starting up my business. signed up and paid the subscription for a trial basis then started getting my grounding, found several way cheaper, with more features, so decided not to continue this contract. i have eleven employees currently and WAP charges based on the users under said account id go bankrupt paying for this id suggest offering more suitable arrangements for smaller businesses, as there are tons more of those popping up everyday theres too much competition in software options for any company to not offer a free or trial package one can afford.
author: April W.
pros: great for budgeting and tracking expenses during month or quarter for large companies, easy to use interface, nice clean layout
cons: way to expensive unless you own cooperate businesses or companies, not suitable for small business owners
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: It was easy for me to go in and train and schedule my associates to do training specific to what was being focused on in a regional setting.
author: Julie R.
pros: It is easy to schedule training. All our associates training is scheduled in workday.
cons: I liked the everything about workday adaptive planning.

review_title: Workday great tool, not so easy to use
description: Overall this is a great product. Once you adapt to it or just bookmark the pages you need and store them on your custom view for easy locating, the software makes HR items and manager requests a breeze.
author: Dori O.
pros: Everything you need is right there. Great all in one software. View time off taken, time off requests, paystubs, taxes, ect. Everything is at your fingertips.
cons: Everything is at your fingertips if you can figure out where it is. The user interface is a little confusing at first and navigating the site isnt the easiest.

description: Overall, its a great basic software that allows everyone to work together pretty well. It just needs some work.
author: Emmanuel R.
pros: It is is so close to great but some of the UI can become a pain. It is so very close to being great.
cons: The UI is kinda clunky at times. Sometimes you find everything you need, sometimes its lost in Narnia. It is so close to perfect.

description: Overall, the experience has been 8/10. There are plenty of good things about the system such as its reliability and its security, however, sometimes it can be bit slow in picking up text.
author: Vipul S.
pros: It is fast, secure, easy to use. Workday Adaptive planning allows for non-financial planners to easily manage and review finances.
cons: Although it takes time to get comfortable with the software, sometimes it can be a bit difficult to learn some aspects of the software.There can also be more chances of error with this type of software.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Workday is mainly for business use, so it does have its areas for improvement. However, if I built a company and had to manage the information of my employees. I would not hesitate to utilize this platform to optimize the company.
author: J'moris M.
pros: I mainly used workday when I was working for FedEx. It was useful when organizing bank statements and schedules. Keeping up with benefits and Tax information was a plus as well.
cons: The only thing I had an issue with was after the update of the workday; there was not a clear enough explanation of how to navigate the apps. The new dashboard shows you everything on the main screen. You still needed to somewhat navigate through the site yourself and figure things out on your own.

review_title: Great product but room for improvement
description: Good experience with very few issues or concerns. Workday has been attentive, responsive, and helpful.
author: Joel S.
pros: It's a great product for reporting purposes within the industry. The office connect add on for excel is really helpful and makes it very easy to switch between different dimensions of data and dissecting.
cons: Tool works well but there are gaps in terms of functionality around cost allocations and the way it uses master data elements.

description: Overall Workday Adaptive Planning is good and works as expected. It is reliable for me to use as a performance management software for budgeting.
author: Terence Z.
pros: The biggest pro about Workday Adaptive Planning is the easy to use dashboard as it offers a drag-and-drop functionality. This helps with making the dashboard easy to use for people with limited technical expertise.
cons: The only con that I would say is that the advance features within Adaptive Planning have a deep learning curve and can take time to learn.

author: Ashkan K.
pros: I liked its very helpful ui system and its various options regarding companies Intregation
cons: Its password protection. It can be change to receive otp

description: So far, so good. Handy platform to book time off. Possibly only request would be to receive an email notifcation
author: Nynke S.
pros: This was a new platform for me, I loved how easy it was to navigate ands start booking time off
cons: No cons found yet, everything seems pretty straight forward.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: In my department it has made it easy to plan work engage teams and also in creating reliable accounting functions.
author: Kefiloe M.
pros: It is simple in work plan follow up of tasks and team work engagement. Accurate accounting and bank reconciliation. Proper prediction and budgeting.
cons: No drawbacks for a while now and it keeps improving.

review_title: Great product, great customer service, lousy delivery on promises and too expensive
description: After a recent meeting I wrote notes: Workday works with large (>500 employee) organizations these days. They are treating us like a small fish. Makes me wonder how strategic more small non-profits like us matter to them. I think they are writing us off. Nightmare roll-out with the implementation partner. We fired them. Adaptive consultants are good but too expensive. Not great at eliciting requirements or managing the project.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: FP&A core functionality is outstanding!!!
cons: Visualization functionality is a kludge!

review_title: Awesome product for a great value. Takes budgeting and forecasting to a new level.
description: There are several benefits from using this software. The biggest benefit is that once your initial model is built you get stability compared to doing your forecast in spreadsheets. When we used spreadsheets most of our time was spent making sure formulas were correct and that there were no bust in the model. With Adaptive, you have confidence that once you test your formulas you can add/takeaway/and modify data and your calculations will work. The other benefit is that if you have a champion and insist that new data be loaded as soon as possible you always have a good/latest view of what the company expects. By doing this forecasting becomes built into your processes and not the annual/quarterly drag that the organization dislikes. Information is kept in a nice concise format that is easy to read.
author: Michael S.
pros: The product if very adaptable. We recently went through a sell process where we were sold by a public company to a private equity firm and back to a public company within a two and half year period. Adaptive was very key to providing the analysis and financial information required for the sell process. While with the private equity firm we changed to a fiscal year but they required us to report both fiscal and calendar year numbers. We also had to push the various EBITDA adjustments back into the financial statements for comparative purposes. I also like the customer service and the fact that Adaptive pushes out a couple of major releases each year to add new functionality requested by the user community.

author: Jeremy H.
pros: Once you get familiar with Workday, it is every easy to use.
cons: Figuring out where everything is that I need.

author: Andrew R.
pros: I like that adaptive has continued to innovate and improve their product over time. The basic plan option is solid for a SMB, though there are some individual bells and whistles that I would like it to have like Office Connect that require a more expensive membership
cons: Learning to speak the adaptive "language" is a big barrier to entry from an employee perspective, we become afraid to change the model for fear of breaking it so we aren't leveraging all we have available to us.

author: Tyler K.
pros: It has great and intuitive features and adapts well.
cons: It is a bit expensive, especially for smaller companies.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Claudio D.
pros: With this tool, we have an easy time planning and automating budgets. It is a great EPM
cons: With Workday Adaptive Planning, no major challenges

review_title: Flexible and Comprehensive Planning and Reporting
description: I've been using Adaptive Planning for 4 years and at 2 employers. The software has not only improved the accuracy and accountability of our budgeting, forecasting and reporting, but has saved thousands of hours of time.
author: Chris S.
pros: The software is flexible. It can be developed and managed internally or you can work with external experts if needed. I like that the cloud software is continuously improving and developing to meet the needs of its customers. There are new releases every six months that improve its functionality based on customer needs and requests. And more importantly, all updates are done on the cloud so that there is no need for the IT department to get involved.
cons: There aren't many things specific to the software that I don't like. I would say that the most difficult part about using this software is managing the requests from management so that it doesn't compromise the value of the software.

description: I use adaptive planning for corporate budgeting and long term forecasting. It is a great tool that is very flexible. Being able to build the financial model in a collaborative, team based manner instead of in numerous different excel models is a much better process.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: [1] Version comparison is easy for variance analysis [2] Adaptive office connect is a very useful excel based reporting tool [3] Flexible system based planning and scenario analysis accelerates planning cycles and reduces data integrity issues
cons: The biggest issue that i have run into is the way actuals flow into locked plan versions. If you have a formula in a locled plan version that references actuals and you change the actuals data, then it will change you plan numbers even though the period is locked.

review_title: Powerful software, makes life easier, business insights more accessible
description: I have previous experience using Hyperion, Peoplesoft, and Microsoft Excel to create and maintain financial models. As flexible as regular spreadsheets are, it was always hard to get everybody on the same page, referencing the same numbers, using the same version. I have been using Adaptive Planning for about 1.5 years now, with about 1 year as a systems administrator for the product. FP&A has truly become simplified. This tool has saved hours upon hours every month, as well improved accuracy and timeliness of reports. This allows us to function better as a business unit, and make more proactive models and decisions. My one gripe with Adaptive is their customer support. I have had a hard time getting several issues resolved in a timely manner. Nonetheless, I would highly recommend Adaptive to anybody stuck in "spreadsheet land"--there really is a better way.
author: Jonathan L.
pros: One source for all models and reported numbers. Interconnected data makes it easy to see the full effect of any changes, large or small.
cons: Customer support needs to work on responsiveness.

description: I feel that the software is bright and easy to use. I like how the widgets and the placements overall of the dashboard makes it easy to find what your looking for.
author: Elizabeth T.
pros: Workday is aesthetically appealing and easy to navigate. As someone who is not tech savvy I appreciate when things are straight forward and not complicated. On a random note, the very unique logo makes it easy to find on a clutter computer dashboard.
cons: I have been using this software for almost a year and have no complains to share at this time. I truly recommend this product.

author: James M.
pros: it runs without interfering with other programs.
cons: does not have any issues that I am aware of.
